project_profile.project_name: AGRO-AI OS: Intelligent Agricultural Weed Automatic Recognition System
pain_points: Current mainstream control methods still rely on manual field inspection and large-area chemical application, which is not only labor-intensive and inefficient but also leads to serious herbicide overuse due to lack of precision.
Approximately 70% of herbicides in traditional spraying methods cannot precisely act on target weeds, causing severe agricultural non-point source pollution and ecological damage.
solution: Developed an intelligent agricultural system based on YOLOv11n deep neural network, achieving automatic recognition and precise positioning of agricultural weeds.
innovation_points: High-Precision Recognition: The model achieves mAP@0.5=97.6%
market_analysis: The global agricultural artificial intelligence market is in rapid development, expected to reach $4 billion by 2025.
